title: mammea micrantha
intro: Mammea micrantha, also known as the Malabar plum or Muntingia calabura, is a tropical fruit-bearing tree native to the Americas and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mammea micrantha include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. The herbal preparations of Mammea micrantha include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for therapeutic purposes.
